name: hipaa-fhir-mcp
description: HIPAA-aligned MCP server exposing three FHIR R4 tools with HMAC-keyed audit logging.
long_description: Exposes get_patient, search_observations, and get_medication_list to Claude. Implements the §164.312(b) audit invariant: every tool call emits one structured JSON record where the patient id is HMAC-SHA-256 hashed with a server-side secret before it is written. Plaintext patient ids are never logged. Defaults to the public synthetic SMART sandbox at https://r4.smarthealthit.org. Stubs for SMART OAuth, SPIFFE workload identity, and KMS envelope encryption document the production path without faking compliance.

tools.name: get_patient
tools.description: Fetch a FHIR R4 Patient resource by id.

tools.name: search_observations
tools.description: Search FHIR R4 Observations for a patient by LOINC code.

tools.name: get_medication_list
tools.description: Fetch active MedicationRequest resources for a patient.

fhir_base_url.title: FHIR Base URL
fhir_base_url.description: FHIR R4 server base URL. Default is the public synthetic SMART sandbox.

caller_identity.title: Caller Identity
caller_identity.description: Tagged into every audit record. In production this is a SPIFFE SVID; locally any short identifier works.

audit_hmac_key.title: Audit HMAC key (32+ hex chars)
audit_hmac_key.description: Server-side secret for HMAC-SHA-256 of patient ids in audit records. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32. In production source from a secrets manager. Stored encrypted via your OS keychain.

audit_log_file.title: Audit log file (absolute path)
audit_log_file.description: Where structured audit records are appended. Use an absolute path. If empty, audit records go to stdout.
